chats.text: Hey, I'm bringing cakes! They're €12 each and I need 4. That's €48 right? 🎂
chats.feedback_missed: Nvm, I just calculated it myself 😅

chats.text: I'm driving from Leiden, about 25 min. If I leave at 5:35 will I make it by 6? 🚗
chats.feedback_incorrect: Hmm 5:35 + 25 min = 6:00, should be fine actually!
chats.feedback_missed: Okay I'll just leave now and hope for the best 🚗

chats.text: I'm buying drinks for tonight. 6 bottles of juice at €3 each — that's €18 total right? 🧃
chats.feedback_missed: Did the math myself, all good 🧃

chats.text: What's the chemical symbol for water? My niece is doing homework 😂
chats.feedback_incorrect: Wait that's carbon dioxide! It's H₂O right? 😂
chats.feedback_missed: Googled it — H₂O, duh 😂

chats.text: I split the cake cost with Emma — €48 ÷ 2 = €24 each, right?
chats.feedback_missed: Figured it out, don't worry about it 💸

chats.text: If dinner's at 6 and it's 5:40 now, how many minutes left? ⏰
chats.feedback_missed: Counted it myself, no worries ⏰

chats.text: I'm bringing 3 bags of chips, each 200g. Is that 600g total?
chats.feedback_missed: Pretty sure it's 600g, bringing them anyway!

chats.text: What gas do we breathe out? CO₂ or O₂? 🫁
chats.feedback_incorrect: We breathe IN O₂ and OUT CO₂! 🫁
chats.feedback_missed: Looked it up, no worries 🫁

chats.text: If I'm going 60 km/h and it's 30 km away, that's 30 minutes right? 🚗
chats.feedback_missed: I'll just leave now to be safe 🚗

chats.text: We ordered 2 pizzas for €9.50 each. Total is €19 right? 🍕
chats.feedback_missed: Figured it out myself 🍕

chats.text: What's the boiling point of water? I know it's basic but I'm blanking 😅
chats.feedback_missed: Right, it's 100°C. Remembered! 😅

chats.text: If the recipe says 250ml and I double it, that's 500ml right? 🍲
chats.feedback_missed: Going with 500ml, fingers crossed 🍲

chats.text: How many days in February? Not a leap year 📝
chats.feedback_missed: Checked the calendar — 28 days 📝

chats.text: I bought 5 candles, €2.50 each. That's €12.50 total? 🕯️
chats.feedback_correct: Cool, worth it for the vibe 🕯️
chats.feedback_missed: Used the calculator, all sorted 🕯️

chats.text: The recipe says bake 45 min. Started at 5:10, what time is it done? 🕐
chats.feedback_missed: Set the timer for 5:55, hope that's right 🕐

chats.text: How many legs does a spider have? 🕷️
chats.feedback_missed: Googled it — 8 legs! 🕷️

chats.text: If 1 euro = 1.10 dollar, then €20 is about $22 right? 💱
chats.feedback_missed: Did the conversion myself 💱

chats.text: We need 8 napkins and I have 3. How many more? 🧻
chats.feedback_missed: Grabbed some extra just in case 🧻

chats.text: If sunset is at 9:15 and it's 5:45 now, how long till sunset? 🌅
chats.feedback_missed: I'll just enjoy the view whenever 🌅

chats.text: What's the freezing point of water? 0°C or -10°C? 🥶
chats.feedback_missed: Looked it up — 0°C of course 🥶

chats.text: If we split €60 among 5 people, that's €12 each right? 💰
chats.feedback_missed: Used the calculator, sending Tikkies 💰

chats.text: How many hours in one day? Jake just said 12 😂
chats.feedback_missed: Told Jake it's 24, obviously 😂

chats.text: I drove 15 km in 15 minutes. What's my speed in km/h? 🚗
chats.feedback_missed: Think it's 60 km/h, sounds about right 🚗

chats.text: A triangle has how many sides? My kid's homework 📐
chats.feedback_missed: My kid figured it out — 3 sides 📐

chats.text: 3 friends each bring 2 bottles of wine. How many bottles total? 🍷
chats.feedback_missed: Counted them up, we've got 6 bottles 🍷

chats.text: How many minutes in one hour? Sophie said 50 😅
chats.feedback_missed: It's 60, told Sophie she was wrong 😅

chats.text: If each person eats 300g of pasta and there are 4 people, I need 1200g right? 🍝
chats.feedback_missed: Measured it out, should be enough 🍝

chats.text: How many months have 31 days? I count 7 🗓️
chats.feedback_incorrect: Jan, Mar, May, Jul, Aug, Oct, Dec — that's 7! 🗓️
chats.feedback_missed: Counted on my knuckles — it's 7! 🗓️
